name: pylibwholegraph-cu12

metadata.name: pylibwholegraph-cu12
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: pylibwholegraph - GPU Graph Storage for GNN feature and graph structure

documentation:
# pylibwholegraph

WholeGraph supports PyTorch and provides a distributed graph and kv store.

Both cuGraph-DGL and cuGraph-PyG can leverage WholeGraph for even greater scalability.
